description: Aligned with Bangalore Building Byelaws 2003. Heritage→Intensely Developed Area (A), CBD→Moderately Developed Area (B), HDZ→Sparsely Developed Area (C). FAR from Table 6, setbacks from Tables 4 & 5, coverage from Table 6, parking from Table 13, industrial from Table 10.

rules.message_template: FSI {fsi} exceeds the Heritage/Residential limit of {max_fsi} (Byelaw Table 6, Intensely Developed Area). Built-up: {built_up_m2} m² on a {plot_area_m2} m² plot.
rules.hint_template: Since you have crossed the FSI limit, you can get additional FSI if you participate in the Green Building Initiative program by having solar panels for energy generation or having onsite wet waste composting measures.

rules.message_template: FSI {fsi} exceeds the Heritage/Commercial limit of {max_fsi} (Byelaw Table 6, Intensely Developed Area).
rules.hint_template: Since you have crossed the FSI limit, you can get additional FSI if you participate in the Green Building Initiative program by having solar panels for energy generation or having onsite wet waste composting measures.

rules.message_template: FSI {fsi} exceeds the Heritage/Industry limit of {max_fsi} (Byelaw Table 10, Industrial buildings).
FSI {fsi} exceeds the CBD/Residential limit of {max_fsi} (Byelaw Table 6, Moderately Developed Area).
rules.hint_template: Since you have crossed the FSI limit, you can get additional FSI if you participate in the Green Building Initiative program by having solar panels for energy generation or having onsite wet waste composting measures.

rules.message_template: FSI {fsi} exceeds the CBD/Commercial limit of {max_fsi} (Byelaw Table 6, Moderately Developed Area).
rules.hint_template: Since you have crossed the FSI limit, you can get additional FSI if you participate in the Green Building Initiative program by having solar panels for energy generation or having onsite wet waste composting measures.

rules.message_template: FSI {fsi} exceeds the CBD/Industry limit of {max_fsi} (Byelaw Table 10, Industrial buildings).
FSI {fsi} exceeds the HDZ/Residential limit of {max_fsi} (Byelaw Table 6, Sparsely Developed Area).
rules.hint_template: Since you have crossed the FSI limit, you can get additional FSI if you participate in the Green Building Initiative program by having solar panels for energy generation or having onsite wet waste composting measures.

rules.message_template: FSI {fsi} exceeds the HDZ/Commercial limit of {max_fsi} (Byelaw Table 6, Sparsely Developed Area).
rules.hint_template: Since you have crossed the FSI limit, you can get additional FSI if you participate in the Green Building Initiative program by having solar panels for energy generation or having onsite wet waste composting measures.

rules.message_template: FSI {fsi} exceeds the HDZ/Industry limit of {max_fsi} (Byelaw Table 10, Industrial buildings).

Floor {violating_level} is only {min_distance_m} m from the plot boundary (Heritage/Residential requires min {min_setback_m} m per Byelaw Table 4). Note: actual setbacks vary by plot depth/width and side.
Floor {violating_level} is only {min_distance_m} m from the plot boundary (Heritage/Commercial requires min {min_setback_m} m per Byelaw Table 4).
Floor {violating_level} is only {min_distance_m} m from the plot boundary (Heritage/Industry requires min {min_setback_m} m per Byelaw Table 10).
Floor {violating_level} is only {min_distance_m} m from the plot boundary (CBD/Residential requires min {min_setback_m} m per Byelaw Table 4).
Floor {violating_level} is only {min_distance_m} m from the plot boundary (CBD/Commercial requires min {min_setback_m} m per Byelaw Table 4).
Floor {violating_level} is only {min_distance_m} m from the plot boundary (CBD/Industry requires min {min_setback_m} m per Byelaw Table 10).
Floor {violating_level} is only {min_distance_m} m from the plot boundary (HDZ/Residential requires min {min_setback_m} m per Byelaw Table 4).
Floor {violating_level} is only {min_distance_m} m from the plot boundary (HDZ/Commercial requires min {min_setback_m} m per Byelaw Table 4).
Floor {violating_level} is only {min_distance_m} m from the plot boundary (HDZ/Industry requires min {min_setback_m} m per Byelaw Table 10).
Floor {violating_level} is only {min_distance_m} m from the plot boundary (buildings above 9.5m require min {min_setback_m} m all-round per Byelaw Table 5).
Ground coverage {coverage_pct}% exceeds the Residential limit of {max_coverage_pct}% (Byelaw Table 6).
Ground coverage {coverage_pct}% exceeds the Commercial limit of {max_coverage_pct}% (Byelaw Table 6).
Ground coverage {coverage_pct}% exceeds the Industry limit of {max_coverage_pct}% (Byelaw Table 10, service industry).
Open space {open_space_pct}% is below the Residential minimum of {min_open_space_pct}% (Byelaw 12.1 vi — 15% minimum for parks and open space).
Open space {open_space_pct}% is below the Commercial minimum of {min_open_space_pct}%.
Open space {open_space_pct}% is below the Industry minimum of {min_open_space_pct}%.
Parking: {parking_slots_provided} provided, {parking_slots_required} required ({primary_slots} primary + {visitor_slots} visitor at 1 slot per {m2_per_slot} m², Byelaw Table 13 sl.10).
Parking: {parking_slots_provided} provided, {parking_slots_required} required ({primary_slots} primary + {visitor_slots} visitor at 1 slot per {m2_per_slot} m², Byelaw Table 13 sl.2/6).
Parking: {parking_slots_provided} provided, {parking_slots_required} required (1 slot per {m2_per_slot} m², Byelaw Table 13 sl.8).
Building height {height_m} m exceeds the airport approach-surface limit of {max_height_m} m (Byelaw Table 12, 15.3).
Building height {height_m} m exceeds the heritage-influence skyline limit of {max_height_m} m.
Floor {violating_level} has height {violating_height_m} m, below the minimum habitable room height of {min_height_m} m (Byelaw 20.1(2)).

Building has {above_grade_floors} above-grade floors and height {height_m} m. Lift provision is required for buildings ≥{height_threshold_m} m or with more than G+3 floors (Byelaw 20.7). has_lift={has_lift}.

FAR exemptions (Byelaw 9.10.3b): parking, staircases, lift rooms, ramps, escalators, machine rooms, open balconies, ducts, water tanks are excluded from FAR calculation. Mark non-habitable floors with is_habitable=false.
Minimum plinth height: 0.45 m above surrounding ground level (Byelaw 19.1). Basement projection must not exceed 1.0 m above average ground level.
Fire safety: Buildings with G+4 floors and above (or height ≥15 m) require clearance from Director of Fire Services (Byelaw 23.1.1).
